mapper.insert: insert into patient (user_id, name, phone, id_card, gender, age, address, relationship, medical_card_no, is_default, create_time, update_time) values (#{userId}, #{name}, #{phone}, #{idCard}, #{gender}, #{age}, #{address}, #{relationship}, #{medicalCardNo}, #{isDefault}, now(), now())
mapper.update: update patient set is_default = 0, update_time = now() where user_id = #{userId}
update patient set is_default = 1, update_time = now() where id = #{id}

update patient
name = #{name},
phone = #{phone},
id_card = #{idCard},
gender = #{gender},
age = #{age},
address = #{address},
relationship = #{relationship},
medical_card_no = #{medicalCardNo},
update_time = now()
where id = #{id}
